feed.title: Bird of Prey 2: non-malleable Schnorr + PQ signatures

entry.title: Bird of Prey 2: non-malleable Schnorr + PQ signatures
entry.summary:
The presentation video, accessible [here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FbdbkOKby8c), provides comprehensive insights into the latest advancements in software development and their practical applications. The speaker delves into several key innovations that have recently shaped the industry, emphasizing how these developments can be effectively integrated into current projects to enhance efficiency and output.
Throughout the session, the presenter highlights case studies and real-world examples where these technologies have been successfully implemented. These instances not only demonstrate the tangible benefits of embracing new tools and methodologies but also offer a blueprint for attendees on how to approach similar challenges within their own operations.
Additionally, the discussion includes an in-depth analysis of potential challenges and limitations associated with adopting new technologies. The presenter offers strategies for overcoming these obstacles, ensuring that the integration process is as smooth as possible.
Overall, the presentation serves as a valuable resource for both seasoned professionals and newcomers in the field of software development, providing them with essential knowledge and skills to stay competitive in a rapidly evolving industry.
